item.title: JavaScript 中更好的语法错误消息 | Better Syntax Error Messages in JavaScript
item.description:
发表于 5 月 27 日

语法错误有时令人生畏，在这里我将解释我如何为我的代码编辑器项目创建更好的错误消息。

作为我的Koduj 项目的一部分，我在其中教授 JavaScript 和创造性的编码课程，我创建了一个使用P5.js 图形库的代码编辑器的原型。

通常，当你在 JavaScript 中犯了一个语法错误时，你会遇到一个运行时错误，这个错误本身并没有太多说明，你需要寻求帮助来破译错误。

一个例子是这段代码：

 function f(x) return 2 * x + 3; }

那应该绘制一个线性函数。 我在关于函数的第二课中使用了这个例子（第一课是关于计算机如何工作的讲座）。

来自 JavaScript 的正常错误如下所示：

 Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token 'return'

通过我的编辑器中的错误看起来像这样：

 Unexpected token, expected "{" (2:5) 1 | function f(x) > 2 | return 2 * x + 1; | ^ 3 | }

如您所见，错误现在很明显，缺少左大括号。

那我是怎么做到的呢？ 我需要说这是偶然的。 我使用Prettier为用户格式化代码，我只在用户按下按钮时才这样做。 但幸运的是，我注意到 Prettier 错误消息比我使用的 JavaScript 解析器（现在我使用espree ）和 JavaScript 运行时的错误消息要好得多。 因此，我在用户所做的每个更改中添加了代码格式，并将其保存在主状态中。 当用户单击格式时，我只使用状态中的内容。 但我现在拥有的是更加用户友好的错误消息。

如果你想看看我在这里建造的操场是链接：

请注意，没有登录，代码使用Firepad 编辑器、 Firebase协作编辑器，因此不止一个用户可以同时编辑代码。 这只是一个原型，如果创建，下一个版本将具有适当的身份验证和授权。

如果您喜欢这篇文章，可以访问我的网站并在 Twitter @jcubic上关注我。

一旦暂停，jcubic 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

解除暂停后，jcubic 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，jcubic 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

如果 jcubic 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

笔记：

感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是您可以用来标记 jcubic 的操作：

降低 jcubic 的所有帖子的可见度

报告其他不当行为

取消标记 jcubic 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Jakub T. Jankiewicz

Posted on May 27

Syntax errors can sometimes be intimidating, here I will explain how I created better error messages for my code editor project.

As part of my Koduj project, where I teach JavaScript with a creative coding course, I've created a prototype of a code editor that uses P5.js graphic library.

Normally when you made a syntax error in JavaScript you have a runtime error that doesn't say much about the error itself and you need to ask for help to decipher the error.

An example is this code:

function f(x) return 2 * x + 3;
}

That should plot a linear function. I use this example in the second lesson about functions (the first lesson is a lecture about how the computer works).

Normal error from JavaScript looks like this:

Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token 'return'

By an error in my editor look like this:

Unexpected token, expected "{" (2:5)
  1 | function f(x)
> 2 |     return 2 * x + 1;
    |     ^
  3 | }

As you can see the error is obvious now, the missing open curly brace.

So how I did do this? I need to say that it's by accident. I use Prettier to format the code for the user, I do that only when the user presses the button. But luckily I've noticed that Prettier error messages are much better than the ones from the JavaScript parser that I was using (right now I use espree) and of course the JavaScript runtime. So I've added formatting of code on every change user made and saved it in the main state. When the user clicks format I just use what is in the state. But what I now have is much more user-friendly error messages.

If you want to see the playground I've built here is the link:

https://p5.javascript.org.pl/energetic-potential

Note that there are no login and the code use the Firepad editor, Firebase collaborative editor so more than one user can edit the code at once. This is just a prototype, the next version if it will be created will have proper authentication and authorization.

If you like this post you can visit my website and follow me on Twitter @jcubic.

Daniil Polovinkin - May 6

Ekaterine Mitagvaria - May 11

Once suspended, jcubic will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, jcubic will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by jcubic will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If jcubic is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag jcubic:

Make all posts by jcubic less visible

jcubic consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging jcubic will restore default visibility to their posts.

item.title: 我的 Vim 之旅：粗略的笔记 | My Vim Journey: Rough Notes
item.description:
注：这是我在学习 Vim、Vi 和 NeoVim 过程中的粗略笔记。 请注意，它们没有特定顺序

模式类型

  • 正常模式
  • 插入模式
  • 视觉模式
  • 命令模式

议案

  • 命令 + 计数 + 运动
    • 跳过代码块
      • 在命令模式下删除和更改文本
        • 缩进
          • 退出并保存
            • 文件标签
              • 插入模式
                • 视觉模式
                  • 集数

                    从 vim 运行命令

                    退出并保存

                    • 跳转到行
                      • 安装 neovim：

                        • 我的 Neovim 配置：init.vim


                           set encoding=utf-8 set fileformat=unix set number syntax enable set background=dark set tabstop=4 set shiftwidth=4 set expandtab set autoindent set smartindent set mouse=a set clipboard=unnamedplus set splitbelow set splitright filetype plugin on filetype plugin indent on autocmd BufNewFile,BufRead *.js setfiletype javascript autocmd BufNewFile,BufRead *.py setfiletype python " autocmd VimEnter * NERDTree " autocmd BufWinEnter,DirChanged * NERDTreeFind autocmd VimEnter * silent! NERDTree autocmd BufWinEnter,DirChanged * if exists("t:NERDTreeBufName") | silent! NERDTreeFind | endif " Terminal settings set shellcmdflag=-ic " Launch shell as an interactive login shell " Terminal mappings tnoremap <Ch> <C-\><CN><Cw>h tnoremap <Cj> <C-\><CN><Cw>j tnoremap <Ck> <C-\><CN><Cw>k tnoremap <Cl> <C-\><CN><Cw>l nnoremap <Cf> :NERDTreeFocus<CR> nnoremap <Cn> :NERDTree<CR> nnoremap <Ct> :NERDTreeToggle<CR> nnoremap <leader>w :w<CR> nnoremap <leader>q :q<CR> inoremap <Esc> <C-\><Cn> nnoremap <Mh> <Cw>h nnoremap <Mj> <Cw>j nnoremap <Mk> <Cw>k nnoremap <Ml> <Cw>l nnoremap <C-Left> <Cw>h nnoremap <C-Down> <Cw>j nnoremap <C-Up> <Cw>k nnoremap <C-Right> <Cw>l nnoremap <Cv> <C-\><CN>pi nnoremap <F5> :NERDTreeRefresh<CR> inoremap <CR> <Cg>u<CR> inoremap <silent><expr> <CR> coc#pum#visible() ? coc#pum#confirm() : "\<CR>" " Terminal commands command! Terminal split term://$SHELL command! VTerminal vsplit term://$SHELL " nnoremap <leader>t :belowright vsplit term://$SHELL<CR> nnoremap <leader>t :split term://$SHELL<CR> call plug#begin() Plug 'sheerun/vim-polyglot' Plug 'vimlab/split-term.vim' Plug 'neoclide/coc.nvim', {'branch': 'release'} Plug 'neovim/nvim-lspconfig' Plug 'kassio/neoterm' Plug 'http://github.com/tpope/vim-surround' " Surrounding ysw) Plug 'https://github.com/preservim/nerdtree' " NerdTree Plug 'https://github.com/tpope/vim-commentary' " For Commenting gcc & gc Plug 'https://github.com/vim-airline/vim-airline' " Status bar Plug 'https://github.com/lifepillar/pgsql.vim' " PSQL Pluging needs :SQLSetType pgsql.vim Plug 'https://github.com/ap/vim-css-color' " CSS Color Preview Plug 'https://github.com/rafi/awesome-vim-colorschemes' " Retro Scheme Plug 'https://github.com/neoclide/coc.nvim' " Auto Completion Plug 'https://github.com/ryanoasis/vim-devicons' " Developer Icons Plug 'https://github.com/tc50cal/vim-terminal' " Vim Terminal Plug 'https://github.com/preservim/tagbar' " Tagbar for code navigation Plug 'https://github.com/terryma/vim-multiple-cursors' " CTRL + N for multiple cursors call plug#end() " Configuration for split-term.vim " Plugin settings set splitright set splitbelow let g:split_term_default_shell = "bash" let g:split_term_vertical = 0 let g:disable_key_mappings = 0 " Coc.nvim mappings nmap <silent> gd <Plug>(coc-definition) nmap <silent> gy <Plug>(coc-type-definition) nmap <silent> gr <Plug>(coc-references) nmap <silent> [g <Plug>(coc-diagnostic-prev) nmap <silent> ]g <Plug>(coc-diagnostic-next) nnoremap <silent> <space>s :<Cu>CocList -I symbols<cr> nnoremap <silent> <space>d :<Cu>CocList diagnostics<cr> nmap <leader>do <Plug>(coc-codeaction) nmap <leader>rn <Plug>(coc-rename) " Coc.nvim global extensions let g:coc_global_extensions = [ \ 'coc-tsserver', \ 'coc-json', \ 'coc-css', \ 'coc-eslint', \ 'coc-prettier' \ ]
                          • 使用终端

                            包装插件

                            call plug#begin() put the plugins here call plug#end()
                            按键绑定
                            nnoremap <cf> :NERDTrueFocus <CR> nnoremap <cn> :NERDTree <CR> nnoremap <cn> :NERDTreeToggle <CR>

                            资料来源： www.youtube.com/watch? v=XBlKG2LW6p4

                            修复自动补全问题：~/Appdata/Local/nvim-data/plugged/coc.nvim

                            资料来源： github.com/neoclide/coc.nvim/issues/3258

                            纱线安装

                            来源 2： www.youtube.com/watch?v =XBlKG2LW6p4

                            关闭终端或窗格

                            单击面板并运行 :close
                            或者退出 vim: :qa

                            用 vim 游戏练习

                            虚拟导师

                            解决问题

                            :!node app.js /usr/bin/bash: /s: No such file or directory shell returned 127

                            解决方案： stackoverflow.com/questions/74389900/un ...

                            只需将行添加到您的 init.vim

                            设置 shellcmdflag=-c

                            拆分窗口

                            水平拆分终端

                            创建文件夹或新文件后刷新树

                            或将其设置为自动刷新，将其添加到您的 init.vim 文件中

                            自动命令 VimEnter * NERDTree

                            或者

                            只需按 r 刷新当前目录的列表或按 R 刷新根目录的列表。

                            更漂亮的配置

                            创建一个名为 coc-settings.json 的新文件并粘贴以下文件

                            { "eslint.autoFixOnSave": true, "eslint.filetypes": ["javascript", "javascriptreact", "typescript", "typescriptreact"], "coc.preferences.formatOnSaveFiletypes": [ "javascript", "javascriptreact", "typescript", "typescriptreact" ], "tsserver.formatOnType": true, "coc.preferences.formatOnType": true }

                            将 CapsLock 重新映射到 esc 键

                            setxkbmap -option caps:escape

                            一旦暂停，drsimplegraffiti 将无法评论或发布帖子，直到他们的暂停被删除。

                            解除暂停后，drsimplegraffiti 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

                            一旦取消发布，drsimplegraffiti 的所有帖子都将隐藏起来，只有他们自己可以访问。

                            如果 drsimplegraffiti 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从他们的仪表板重新发布他们的帖子。

                            笔记：

                            感谢您维护 DEV 社区的安全。 以下是标记 drsimplegraffiti 的方法：

                            降低 drsimplegraffiti 的所有帖子的可见度

                            报告其他不当行为

                            取消标记 drsimplegraffiti 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

Note: This is a rough note on my journey in learning Vim, Vi and NeoVim. Note that they are not in particular order

Vim 101

Types of Mode

  • Normal mode
  • Insert mode
  • Visual mode
  • Command mode

Motions

  • [x] k - Upward
  • [x] j - Downward
  • [x] l - Right
  • [x] h - Left
  • [x] w - Hop forward between words
  • [x] b - Hop backward between words
  • [x] e - Move to the end of line
  • [x] ~ - swap to upper or lower case

Command + Count + Motion

  • 8k - Jump up 8 lines
  • 16j - Jump down 16 lines
  • d$ - delete to the end of the line
  • de - delete to the end of the word
  • dG - delete to the end of the file

Skip code block

  • } - skip code block
  • { - skip code block
  • ctrl+e / ctrl+y - Scroll down/up one line
  • Ctrl+d - Move down half a page
  • Ctrl+u - Move up half a page
Delete and Change text in command mode
  • dd - delete a single line
  • x - delete while in command mode
  • r - change a text while in command mode
  • u - undo
  • Ctrl + r - Redo
  • d3j - delete 2 words down
  • d2w - delete 2 words forwars
  • db - delete backward
  • d2j - delete 2 words doward
  • c - Delete, then start insert mode
  • cc - Delete line, then start insert mode
INDENT
  • >> Indent forward
  • << Indent backward

Quit and Save

  • :qa - Quit all open buffers
  • :wa - Write all open buffers
  • :wqa - Write and quit all open buffers
  • :q - Quit current buffer
    • :w - Write current buffer
    • :wq - Write and quit current buffer

File Tabs

  • :e filename - Find and open a file in a new buffer
  • :tabe - Make a new tab
  • :vsp - Vertically split windows and open a file
  • ctrl+ws - Split windows horizontally
  • ctrl+wv - Split windows vertically
  • ctrl+ww - Switch between windows in normal mode

Insert mode

  • I - insert to the beginning of the line
  • i - insert to the left of the word
  • a - insert to the right after the word
  • A - insert to the end of the line
  • esc - Leave insert mode
  • Ctrl + c - leave insert mode method 2
  • a - insert to the other side
  • o - insert a new line and enter into insert mode
  • O - insert a new line above
  • c - change mode
  • . - repeat an action multiple times
  • / - search for something in the file e.g /console.log Then use n to jump to the desired match, Shift N to jump back
  • : - run a command
  • n - Repeat search in same direction
  • N - Repeat search in opposite direction
Visual mode
  • v - visual mode
  • vw - highlight the word forward
  • y - yank (copy)
  • p - paste below
  • P - paste above a line
  • shift + p - Visual line mode
  • y5j - copy 5 lines down from where you are
  • d5j - delete 5 lines downward
Set number

:set number

Run command from vim

:!ls
:!node app.js

Quit and saving
  • :q - quit without saving changes
  • :q! - quit and save changes
  • :wq - write and quit with changes changed
  • :qa - Quit all tabs and terminal
Jump to line
  • :2 - go to line 2
  • :3 - go to line 3

Neovim

Install neovim:

  • [x] Open the power-shell in administrator mode
  • [X] Choco install neovim and also choco install vim-plug
  • [X] Check if neovim is installed, run: nvim in your terminal
  • [X] open your run command and type %appdata%
  • [X] Press cmd on top and navigate to command mode
  • [X] cd .. away from the Roaming folder
  • [X] cd Local
  • [X] create a new folder called nvim
  • [X] Create a file called init.vim
  • [X] paste the following config there

My Neovim config: init.vim 


set encoding=utf-8
set fileformat=unix
set number
syntax enable
set background=dark
set tabstop=4
set shiftwidth=4
set expandtab
set autoindent
set smartindent
set mouse=a
set clipboard=unnamedplus
set splitbelow
set splitright
filetype plugin on
filetype plugin indent on
autocmd BufNewFile,BufRead *.js setfiletype javascript
autocmd BufNewFile,BufRead *.py setfiletype python
" autocmd VimEnter * NERDTree
" autocmd BufWinEnter,DirChanged * NERDTreeFind
autocmd VimEnter * silent! NERDTree
autocmd BufWinEnter,DirChanged * if exists("t:NERDTreeBufName") | silent! NERDTreeFind | endif " Terminal settings
set shellcmdflag=-ic " Launch shell as an interactive login shell " Terminal mappings
tnoremap <C-h> <C-\><C-N><C-w>h
tnoremap <C-j> <C-\><C-N><C-w>j
tnoremap <C-k> <C-\><C-N><C-w>k
tnoremap <C-l> <C-\><C-N><C-w>l
nnoremap <C-f> :NERDTreeFocus<CR>
nnoremap <C-n> :NERDTree<CR>
nnoremap <C-t> :NERDTreeToggle<CR>
nnoremap <leader>w :w<CR>
nnoremap <leader>q :q<CR>
inoremap <Esc> <C-\><C-n>
nnoremap <M-h> <C-w>h
nnoremap <M-j> <C-w>j
nnoremap <M-k> <C-w>k
nnoremap <M-l> <C-w>l
nnoremap <C-Left> <C-w>h
nnoremap <C-Down> <C-w>j
nnoremap <C-Up> <C-w>k
nnoremap <C-Right> <C-w>l
nnoremap <C-v> <C-\><C-N>pi
nnoremap <F5> :NERDTreeRefresh<CR>
inoremap <CR> <C-g>u<CR>
inoremap <silent><expr> <CR> coc#pum#visible() ? coc#pum#confirm() : "\<CR>" " Terminal commands
command! Terminal split term://$SHELL
command! VTerminal vsplit term://$SHELL
" nnoremap <leader>t :belowright vsplit term://$SHELL<CR>
nnoremap <leader>t :split term://$SHELL<CR> call plug#begin()
Plug 'sheerun/vim-polyglot'
Plug 'vimlab/split-term.vim'
Plug 'neoclide/coc.nvim', {'branch': 'release'}
Plug 'neovim/nvim-lspconfig'
Plug 'kassio/neoterm'
Plug 'http://github.com/tpope/vim-surround' " Surrounding ysw)
Plug 'https://github.com/preservim/nerdtree' " NerdTree
Plug 'https://github.com/tpope/vim-commentary' " For Commenting gcc & gc
Plug 'https://github.com/vim-airline/vim-airline' " Status bar
Plug 'https://github.com/lifepillar/pgsql.vim' " PSQL Pluging needs :SQLSetType pgsql.vim
Plug 'https://github.com/ap/vim-css-color' " CSS Color Preview
Plug 'https://github.com/rafi/awesome-vim-colorschemes' " Retro Scheme
Plug 'https://github.com/neoclide/coc.nvim' " Auto Completion
Plug 'https://github.com/ryanoasis/vim-devicons' " Developer Icons
Plug 'https://github.com/tc50cal/vim-terminal' " Vim Terminal
Plug 'https://github.com/preservim/tagbar' " Tagbar for code navigation
Plug 'https://github.com/terryma/vim-multiple-cursors' " CTRL + N for multiple cursors
call plug#end() " Configuration for split-term.vim
" Plugin settings
set splitright
set splitbelow
let g:split_term_default_shell = "bash"
let g:split_term_vertical = 0
let g:disable_key_mappings = 0 " Coc.nvim mappings
nmap <silent> gd <Plug>(coc-definition)
nmap <silent> gy <Plug>(coc-type-definition)
nmap <silent> gr <Plug>(coc-references)
nmap <silent> [g <Plug>(coc-diagnostic-prev)
nmap <silent> ]g <Plug>(coc-diagnostic-next)
nnoremap <silent> <space>s :<C-u>CocList -I symbols<cr>
nnoremap <silent> <space>d :<C-u>CocList diagnostics<cr>
nmap <leader>do <Plug>(coc-codeaction)
nmap <leader>rn <Plug>(coc-rename) " Coc.nvim global extensions
let g:coc_global_extensions = [
 \ 'coc-tsserver',
 \ 'coc-json',
 \ 'coc-css',
 \ 'coc-eslint',
 \ 'coc-prettier'
 \ ]
  • [x] Then enter :wq to write and quit
  • [x] Then why in the AppData\Local\nvim path
  • [x] Run the :PlugInstall, this command installs the github plugin
  • [x] To delete the plugin, remove the Plug e.g Plug 'github.com/ap/vim-css-color' " CSS Color Preview and run :PlugClean
To use terminal

\ t for horizontal Where \ is the leader

:Term for vertical

Wrapping plugins 

call plug#begin()
put the plugins here
call plug#end()
Key binding 
nnoremap <c-f> :NERDTrueFocus <CR>
nnoremap <c-n> :NERDTree <CR>
nnoremap <c-n> :NERDTreeToggle <CR>

Source: www.youtube.com/watch?v=XBlKG2LW6p4

Fix the auto complete issue: ~/Appdata/Local/nvim-data/plugged/coc.nvim

Source: github.com/neoclide/coc.nvim/issues/3258

cd ~/Appdata/Local/nvim-data/plugged/coc.nvim
yarn install

Bash Aliases

nvim ~/.bash_profile

Source 2: www.youtube.com/watch?v=XBlKG2LW6p4

Close terminal or pane

Click on the panel and run :close
or quit vim: :qa

Practice with vim game

vimtutor

Fixing the issue 

:!node app.js
/usr/bin/bash: /s: No such file or directory

shell returned 127

Solution: stackoverflow.com/questions/74389900/un…

Just add the line to your init.vim

set shellcmdflag=-c

Split window

:sp

Split terminal horizontally

:split term://$SHELL

Refresh tree after creating folder or a new file

:NERDTreeRefresh

or set it to refresh automatically, add this into your init.vim file

autocmd VimEnter * NERDTree

or

simply hit r to refresh the current directory's listing or R to refresh the root directory's listing .

Prettier configuration

Create a new file called coc-settings.json and paste the following files

{
  "eslint.autoFixOnSave": true,
  "eslint.filetypes": ["javascript", "javascriptreact", "typescript", "typescriptreact"],
  "coc.preferences.formatOnSaveFiletypes": [
    "javascript",
    "javascriptreact",
    "typescript",
    "typescriptreact"
  ],
  "tsserver.formatOnType": true,
  "coc.preferences.formatOnType": true
}

Remap your CapsLock to esc key 

setxkbmap -option caps:escape

Sergey Leschev - Dec 15 '22

Sergey Leschev - Dec 15 '22

Pragati Verma - Nov 26 '22

Once suspended, drsimplegraffiti will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, drsimplegraffiti will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by drsimplegraffiti will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If drsimplegraffiti is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag drsimplegraffiti:

Make all posts by drsimplegraffiti less visible

drsimplegraffiti consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging drsimplegraffiti will restore default visibility to their posts.
